scripts.db:migrate: sh -c 'test -n "$NAME" || (echo "Set NAME, e.g. NAME=add_users pnpm db:migrate" && exit 1); docker compose exec api sh -lc "cd /app/apps/api && pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --name $NAME"'
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec api sh -lc 'cd /app/apps/api && pnpm exec prisma db seed'
